goal_text:
You are traveling to Cambridge and looking forward to try local restaurants.
You are looking for a 'train'. The train should leave on 'monday' and should depart from 'cambridge'.
The train should 'arrive by 18:30' and should go to 'norwich'.
Make sure you get 'departure time' and 'travel time'.
You are also looking for a 'particular restaurant'. Its name is called 'shanghai family restaurant'.
Make sure you get 'food type' and 'area'.Remember. You don't want booking for restaurant. Just get the information and it all done.
Remember. You don't want booking for train. Just get the information and it all done.

message: You are traveling to Cambridge and looking forward to try local restaurants

The train should arrive by 18:30 and should go to norwich

You are also looking for a particular restaurant. Its name is called shanghai family restaurant
